attributes.action: Condemn illegal, offensive US-Israel war against Iran and withdraw all support
attributes.additional_details: The UK has been drawn into illegal and offensive wars in the Middle East by the USA before, in Afghanistan and Iraq. The UK population remembers and will not tolerate another, with risk to our service members and national security, as well as financial cost to the UK taxpayer.
attributes.background: Withdraw all UK support for the US-Israel war against Iran, including access to our military bases, intelligence sharing and logistical support. The US and Israel started this war unprovoked and people are dying as a direct result. They must realise the world does not support them.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
